_comment: remove the _ before a non-comment/info propertie to enable it
For more info use json schemas to get a description and allowed value for every properties
For more info on the possible documentation properties check schema and/or the github
apworld_description: Final Fantasy XIV is a massively multiplayer online role-playing game (MMORPG) developed and published by Square Enix.
Explore the world of Eorzea, complete dungeons, trials, and FATEs to find multiworld items.
Items in FFXIV are: access to zones, increases to your soft level cap, and fishing tackle.

tutorials.name: Multiworld Setup Guide
tutorials.description: A guide to setting up Final Fantasy XIV for Archipelago multiworld games.
tutorials._comment: if you dont include the authors it will use creator from game.json
